nasb.text: But when the brethren learned of it, they brought him down to Caesarea and sent him away to Tarsus.

esv.text: And when the brothers learned this, they brought him down to Caesarea and sent him off to Tarsus.

cnv.text: 弟兄們知道了，就送他到該撒利亞，差他往大數去。

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹知道这消息后，就把扫罗带到凯撒利亚，然后送他到大数去。

csbs.text: 弟兄们知道了这事，就带他下到凯撒里亚，然后送他往塔尔苏去。
